---
name: 功能建議｜Feature Request
about: 提出新功能、玩法改善、UI優化、音效調整或遊戲體驗建議。Suggest new features, gameplay improvements, UI
  changes, audio adjustments, or player experience ideas.
title: "[Feature] 新增教學畫面"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## 功能建議｜Feature Request

請簡單描述你希望加入或改善的功能。  
Please briefly describe the feature or improvement you would like to suggest.

---

## 建議類型｜Suggestion Type

請勾選最接近的類型。  
Please select the most relevant type.

- [ ] 新玩法 / New gameplay feature
- [ ] UI 改善 / UI improvement
- [ ] 操作手感 / Controls and game feel
- [ ] 戰鬥回饋 / Combat feedback
- [ ] 音樂音效 / Music and sound effects
- [ ] 敵人或關卡 / Enemies or stages
- [ ] 平衡性調整 / Balance adjustment
- [ ] 其他 / Other

---

## 為什麼需要這個功能？｜Why is this needed?

這個功能可以解決什麼問題，或讓遊戲變得更好玩嗎？  
What problem would this solve, or how would it make the game better?

---

## 你希望它怎麼運作？｜How should it work?

請描述你想像中的運作方式。  
Please describe how you imagine this feature should work.

例如：  
For example:

- 玩家消除 2 行以上時，角色攻擊特效變得更明顯。
- Combo 越高，敵人受擊動畫越誇張。
- 新增一個教學畫面，讓玩家知道 T-Spin、Combo、Perfect Clear 的效果。
- Add stronger attack effects when clearing 2 or more lines.
- Make enemy hit reactions more dramatic when combos increase.
- Add a tutorial screen explaining T-Spin, Combo, and Perfect Clear effects.

---

## 對遊戲體驗的影響｜Impact on Player Experience

這個功能會怎麼影響玩家的遊戲體驗？  
How would this feature affect the player experience?

- [ ] 讓操作更順暢 / Makes controls smoother
- [ ] 讓戰鬥更有爽感 / Makes combat feel more satisfying
- [ ] 讓 UI 更清楚 / Makes the UI clearer
- [ ] 讓遊戲更有挑戰性 / Makes the game more challenging
- [ ] 讓新手更容易理解 / Makes the game easier for beginners
- [ ] 讓遊戲更完整 / Makes the game feel more complete

---

## 參考資料｜References

如果有參考圖片、影片、遊戲、音效或連結，可以放在這裡。  
If you have reference images, videos, games, sound effects, or links, you can add them here.

---

## 補充說明｜Additional Notes

還有其他想補充的內容可以寫在這裡。  
Add any other notes here.
